mapper.select: SELECT bi.id, bi.bom_head_id, bi.materiel_item_code, bi.materiel_item_desc, bi.line_no, bi.item_num, bi.item_unit, bi.oper_typer, bi.child_bom_id, bi.item_mat_type, cb.bom_code AS child_bom_code, bi.create_time, bi.create_username, bi.update_time, bi.update_username FROM sp_bom_item bi LEFT JOIN sp_bom cb ON cb.id = bi.child_bom_id WHERE bi.bom_head_id = #{bomHeadId} ORDER BY CAST(bi.line_no AS UNSIGNED)
